productName: hashbreak - Pre Rolls (Infused) - Wild Berry Punch - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Wild Berry Punch and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a sweet, ripe berry flavor, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
